# cohort_collapse { #cdmconnector.cohort_collapse }

```python
cohort_collapse(x)
```

Collapse overlapping cohort periods per (cohort_definition_id, subject_id) into contiguous intervals.

Expects columns cohort_definition_id, subject_id, cohort_start_date, cohort_end_date.
Orders by cohort_start_date and duration, then merges overlapping/adjacent periods.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                           | Description                              | Default    |
|--------|--------------------------------|------------------------------------------|------------|
| x      | Ibis table or pandas DataFrame | Cohort-like table with required columns. | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                                                         |
|--------|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | Collapsed cohort with columns cohort_definition_id, subject_id, cohort_start_date, cohort_end_date. |
